playlist.title: Playlist
playlist.description: A shared music player playlist that can be loaded on any device using a short save code.

id.description: The unique short save code in uppercase, e.g., AB12CD.

songs.description: List of song tracks in the playlist.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the playlist was created.

playlists/{playlistId}.description: Collection of shared playlists, indexed by its unique save code.
